title: Fine and mild weather on Tuesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Only minor...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Only minor weather warnings have been issued for Tuesday.


> Fire danger warnings


Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the north-western parts of Eastern Cape, western parts of Free State as well as most of the Northern Cape except over northern part of the Dawid Kruiper local municipality.


> Weather advisories


A. High discomfort values: Hot and humid weather will result in extremely uncomfortable conditions over the north-eastern parts of KwaZulu-Natal.

B. A heat wave with persistently high temperatures is expected over Matatiele and Umzimvubu Local municipalities of the Eastern Cape.


> Weather forecast for Tuesday 19 November


Cape TownFine with moderate to fresh southerly to south-easterly wind.

Minimum/Maximum: 16/24

The expected UVB Sunburn Index: Extreme

George

Cloudy in the morning, otherwise partly cloudy. Light to moderate westerly to south-westerly wind.

Minimum/Maximum: 13/21

Gqeberha

Cloudy with a chance of light rain with a fresh to strong south- westerly wind.

Minimum/Maximum: 14/24

Wednesday 20 November

Thursday 21 November

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
